message:
fix(core): eliminate unused-variable warnings in lock_order release builds

Rename _level parameters to level and add #[allow(unused_variables)]
since the variables are only consumed inside #[cfg(debug_assertions)]
blocks. Fixes clippy warnings in release mode for check_before_acquire,
did_acquire, and did_release.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
